## Description

Describe the Terraform changes in this PR.

## Type of Change

- [ ] New module
- [ ] Module update
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] CI/CD change

## Terraform Checklist

- [ ] `terraform fmt -recursive` passes
- [ ] `terraform validate` passes
- [ ] `terraform plan` output reviewed
- [ ] No `*.tfstate`, `*.tfvars`, or `.terraform/` committed
- [ ] Cost implications considered and documented
- [ ] README updated for new resources

## Cost Impact

Describe any AWS resources added/removed and estimated cost impact.
